title: Doctor survives corrupt phase files
goal: mini doctor catches CorruptPhaseError from load() and reports it as a separate diagnostic finding (with the corrupt file path) instead of crashing, with a test for a corrupt phase file

steps.title: Catch CorruptPhaseError around doctor's load
steps.detail: Wrap await load(cwd) at doctor.ts:319 in try/catch; on CorruptPhaseError capture its filePath, skip phase-hygiene checks needing full state (orphaned/stale), continue without aborting. Re-throw any non-corrupt error so genuine bugs stay loud.

steps.title: Render corruption as a failed check
steps.detail: Add corruptPhaseFile: string | null to DoctorInput; buildDiagnostics emits a fail 'Phases' check naming the file with a fix hint when set. Keep it pure (no I/O).

steps.title: Unit-test the corrupt-phase diagnostic
steps.detail: Test buildDiagnostics returns a fail check with the path when corruptPhaseFile is set, and that stale/orphaned checks are suppressed in that case.

steps.title: Integration test: doctor survives corruption
steps.detail: With a project whose .mini/phases/phase-N.json is unparseable, doctor() completes without throwing and reports the corruption instead of crashing.

steps.title: Verify build, typecheck and tests pass
steps.detail: npm run build, typecheck and the test suite all green.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 181: Doctor survives corrupt phase files
